prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约7712→13492→11409→19853→17695名。2021至2022年大幅后移约5780名，2023年小幅回升至11409名，2024年因贵州首年新高考改革 （理科→物理类）位次骤降至19853名，2025年回升至17695名，近两年波动较大。2025年基准位次约17695名；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年50人 、2022年50人、2023年48人、2024年49人、2025年27人（大幅缩减），2026年计划35人，较2025年增加8人，扩招约29.6%，竞争压力有所缓解，位次数字预计后移。北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第65名，近年排名稳定在59–72名区间，属于中上游211院校，对贵州省考生有较强吸引力。\ n2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及一名拟录取研究生因不当言论被取消资格事件，对学校形象有一定影响；抖音热度排名第57位（较热），短视频曝光量中等 偏上；近五年无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理整体平稳。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，土木工程、材料科学与工程、光学工程、软件工程获 评A-，共5个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与该校招生专业（土木类、软件工程、机器人工程、通信工程等）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电 气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，土木建筑类分化观望偏劝退；贵州省2025年物理类考生约20.7万人，2026年总考生约29.9万人，按比例估算物理类约20.8万人，考生规 模基本持平略增，竞争略有加剧；北京工业大学位于北京市，对贵州省考生属于跨省报考，地域偏好上北京高校吸引力较 强；该校在贵州招生占比约1.5%–2%，属正常跨省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17695名、2026年大幅扩招约29.6%（位次后移主因）、考生规模略增、声誉偏 负面但热度较热等因素，结合考生规模略增和声誉偏负面做小幅修正，预测2026年最低位次约20811名，区间20311–21311名。

- 机器人工程
- 通信工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约20811名，区间20311–21311名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力（能源动力类、机械类、信息管理与信息系统等），一档专业（软件工程实验班、机器人工程、 通信工程）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（土木类、城乡规划等）作为保底。该校工科实力突出，软件工程、土木工程等为A-学科，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 7712 → 13492 → 11409 → 19853 → 17695. From 2021 to 2022, there was a significant drop of about 5780 places; in 2023, a slight recovery to 11409; in 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao reform in Guizhou (Science → Physics Category), the ranking sharply fell to 19853; in 2025, it recovered to 17695, showing large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17695. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Guizhou Province: 50 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 27 in 2025 (significantly reduced), and a planned 35 in 2026, an increase of 8 students from 2025, an expansion of about 29.6%, easing competition pressure and expected to push the ranking backward. Beijing University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 65th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 59–72 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, and has strong appeal to Guizhou candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to an incident where a prospective graduate student was disqualified for inappropriate remarks, which had some impact on the school's image; Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; there have been no records of cutoff line drops or crashes in the past five years, and the overall application psychology is stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Software Engineering received A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting strong engineering strength, which highly matches the university's enrollment majors (Civil Engineering, Software Engineering, Robotics Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity; Civil Engineering and Architecture are polarized, with some advising against them. In 2025, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guizhou is about 207,000; in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 299,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 208,000, roughly flat with a slight increase, leading to slightly intensified competition. Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, and for Guizhou candidates, it is a cross-province application, with Beijing universities having strong regional appeal. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%–2%, which is a normal cross-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 17695, the significant enrollment expansion of about 29.6% in 2026 (main reason for ranking backward), a slight increase in candidate numbers, a somewhat negative reputation but relatively hot popularity, and making minor adjustments based on the slight increase in candidate numbers and negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 20811, with a range of 20311–21311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 20811, range 20311–21311. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Energy and Power Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Management and Information Systems, etc.) as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Software Engineering Experimental Class, Robotics Engineering, Communication Engineering) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, etc.) as safety options. The university has strong engineering strength, with Software Engineering and Civil Engineering being A- disciplines, worthy of special attention.
